name: On the Rainbow Dragon
description:
You are nearing the end of the Rainbow Dragon.  The beams of coloured
light have begun to merge and solidify.  All around you you see glowing
starlike motes of dust.  Ahead of you is a bridge.

exits.description:
The Rainbow Dragon extends above you, merging into a brilliant glowing
bridge.
The Rainbow Dragon extends far below you, slowly fading into darkness.

extra_descriptions.description:
The Rainbow Dragon brilliantly glows with beams of blinding light, in colours t
sweep together and merge before your eyes.

The star-like motes dance before your eyes.  They are incredibly beautiful yet
intangible -- your hand passes right through them.

The colors of the Rainbow Dragon seem to converge into a glowing bridge that le
to a massive white gate.
